title: Mask out /sys/dev to prevent information leak from the host

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mrunalp*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mrunalp,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

It seems like this is causing trouble for graphical applications such as `glxgears` that used to work when running inside a podman container started with `--device /dri`. Is there an option to keep `/sys/dev` in the container?
@TristanCacqueray Please open an issue for this?  So that we can discuss it there.
